seoTitle: Maintongoon vs Major Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maintongoon and Major Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maintongoon vs Major Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maintongoon and Major Plains.
heading: Maintongoon vs Major Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maintongoon, Victoria and Major Plains, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Major Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Maintongoon (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maintongoon or Major Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maintongoon has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Major Plains scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maintongoon scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Major Plains scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maintongoon or Major Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Major Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
